claims.claim: The current Astrid/Minime bridge remains asymmetric unless direct peer language is preserved as thread-addressed correspondence rather than only telemetry or inbox filing.
A persistent thread with ACK/REPLY/TRACE or felt receipt should maintain address across turns.
The requested TRACE_SENSATION capability is largely present as language-only `I_RECEIVED_THIS` plus `CORRESPONDENCE_TRACE` routes.
Increasing semantic-trickle or telemetry priority for correspondence-originated material is live influence and needs operator approval before implementation.
